title: Mirrored columns display as Null on API

posts.author: DiegoL (Diego)
posts.cookedHtml:
Mirrored Column Item values are being displayed as null when requested through API, this is the API request. Shouldn’t this be fixed?:

query
{
  boards(ids:[BOARD_ID])
  {
  	items(ids:[ITEM_ID])
    {
      column_values
      {
        id
        value
      }
    }
  }
}

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DiegoL

That is expected behavior, see https://developer.monday.com/api-reference/docs/mirrorhttps://developer.monday.com/api-reference/docs/mirror
